evidence.description: Parviz Fattah served simultaneously as deputy commander of Khatam al-Anbiya and executive director of Bonyad-e Taavon-e Sepah's investment arm, illustrating the institutional overlap between these two IRGC economic entities.

editorial_notes: Both are IRGC economic arms; Khatam al-Anbiya is construction-focused, Bonyad Taavon Sepah is the cooperative/investment arm.
